title: Update vendor for urfave/cli back to master
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Stealing @vrothberg 's https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/1310 commit for Buildah too.  Getting Buildah back on urfave/cli master after @vrothberg's short option commit was merged.  No changes to any files other than vendor.conf.

I've also added changes to .papr.yml to fix an authentication issue there with the local registry.

comments.body: LGTM :)
hmm, looks like the registry setup by papr is having issues that it's not had prior.  Will see if I can figure out what's what there.....
LGTM
bot, retest this please

@rhatdan papr tests are failing on an auth to the local registry without much error information.  This is a new behavior for something that hasn't changed in many months, maybe a year now.  Same exact setup is working in Travis.  Trying to figure out what's what, if worse comes to worse I may yank it all out later today so builds can progress.
LGTM

The Red Hat CI got past the registry setup then ran the bats twice successfully and then failed on the third iteration:

```
ok 113 from volume test
not ok 114 from volume ro test
# (in test file ./from.bats, line 304)
#   `[ "$status" -eq 0 ]' failed
# /root/gopath/src/github.com/projectatomic/buildah/runc
...
# time="2018-08-21T17:25:15Z" level=debug msg="saved image metadata \"{}\""
# time="2018-08-21T17:25:15Z" level=debug msg="Creating dest directory: /var/tmp/tmpcc1a7ab12b1554745126bb2a/root/vfs/dir/f6f22f152ad27243bd3a4d80d06aec485771da6314ba8fde8bc5c48f760e9953"
# time="2018-08-21T17:25:15Z" level=debug msg="Calling TarUntar(/var/tmp/tmpcc1a7ab12b1554745126bb2a/root/vfs/dir/73046094a9b835e443af1a9d736fcfc11a994107500e474d0abf399499ed280c, /var/tmp/tmpcc1a7ab12b1554745126bb2a/root/vfs/dir/f6f22f152ad27243bd3a4d80d06aec485771da6314ba8fde8bc5c48f760e9953)"
# time="2018-08-21T17:25:15Z" level=debug msg="TarUntar(/var/tmp/tmpcc1a7ab12b1554745126bb2a/root/vfs/dir/73046094a9b835e443af1a9d736fcfc11a994107500e474d0abf399499ed280c /var/tmp/tmpcc1a7ab12b1554745126bb2a/root/vfs/dir/f6f22f152ad27243bd3a4d80d06aec485771da6314ba8fde8bc5c48f760e9953)"
# time="2018-08-21T17:25:15Z" level=debug msg="exporting opaque data as blob \"sha256:11cd0b38bc3ceb958ffb2f9bd70be3fb317ce7d255c8a4c3f4af30e298aa1aab\""
# error running container: error creating container for [/bin/cat /proc/mounts]: container_linux.go:336: starting container process caused "process_linux.go:402: container init caused \"rootfs_linux.go:57: mounting \\\"/var/tmp/buildah315817231/mnt/buildah-bind-target-6\\\" to rootfs \\\"/var/tmp/buildah315817231/mnt/rootfs\\\" at \\\"/var/tmp/buildah315817231/mnt/rootfs/myvol\\\" caused \\\"operation not permitted\\\"\"" : exit status 1
```
Going to rekick as this is blocking other builds.
bot, retest this please.
OK bot, ignore me and I'll squish you!
Papr flaked with a fedora registry issue now.
bot, retest this please.
Ugh, we're hosed until the registry rights itself.
bot, retest this please.
bot, retest this please.
bot, retest this please.
Still not able to get to the registry from papr....
Yeah!  finally a green Red Hat CI test run.
@nalind or @rhdatan can you approve/merge this if appropriate please?  Once in, this will clear up the test issues the other jobs are hitting.
@rh-atomic-bot r+

:pushpin: Commit 5caf697 has been approved by `nalind`
